summary: Iteration 22: Comprehensive testing of Staff Management Module. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). All UI features verified - Staff Master CRUD, Attendance P/A/H/CH marking, Advance tracking, Salary Calculation with correct days_worked formula, Payment with auto Cash Book integration.

issues: Minor React warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement recommended

1_staff_tab_navigation.description: Staff tab visible in main navigation

2_staff_sub_tabs.description: 4 sub-tabs: Attendance, Salary Payment, Advance, Staff Master

3_staff_master_crud.description: Staff Master - Add/Edit/Delete staff with salary type (monthly/weekly)

test_results.staff_list_displays: PASS - Shows 2 staff: Eshwer (Monthly ₹12,000/mo, Per Day ₹400), Raju (Weekly ₹500/day)
test_results.add_staff_dialog: PASS - Name, Salary Type dropdown (Monthly/Weekly), Salary Amount, Save button

4_attendance_tab.description: Attendance - Date picker, P/A/H/CH buttons, Save bulk attendance

test_results.p_a_h_ch_buttons: PASS - All 4 status buttons for each staff
test_results.legend_displayed: PASS - P=Present, A=Absent, H=Half Day, CH=Holiday (Paid)

5_advance_tab.description: Advance - Add advance for staff, delete advance, shows balance

test_results.give_advance_dialog: PASS - Staff dropdown, Amount, Date, Description fields

6_salary_payment_tab.description: Salary Payment - Select staff, date range, calculate, advance deduct, pay & settle

test_results.staff_select: PASS - Shows staff with salary info
test_results.days_breakdown_cards: PASS - Total Days(5), Present(2), Half Day(1), Holiday-Paid(1), Absent(1)
test_results.cash_book_note: PASS - Shows 'Cash Book mein auto Nikasi entry banega'

7_salary_calculation_formula.description: Monthly: salary/30 × days_worked, Weekly: per_day × days_worked

test_results.gross_salary_formula: PASS - Days Worked × Per Day Rate

8_payment_cash_book_integration.description: Payment creates auto Cash Book nikasi entry with category 'Staff Salary'

test_results.delete_removes_both: PASS - DELETE /api/staff/payments/{id} removes payment AND cash book entry

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/staff_master_tab.png - Staff Master list with Eshwer and Raju
.screenshots/staff_add_dialog.png - Add Staff dialog with name, type, salary fields
.screenshots/salary_calculation_result.png - Salary calculation with all cards and values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested Staff Management Module completely. All CRUD operations working: Staff Master (monthly/weekly salary types), Attendance (P/A/H/CH statuses with bulk save), Advance (add/delete with balance tracking), Salary Payment (calculate with days_worked = P+H+0.5HD, advance deduction, auto Cash Book nikasi entry). Test data exists: Eshwer (monthly ₹12,000), Raju (weekly ₹500/day), Eshwer has ₹6,000 advance and 5 days attendance records.
